title: Mob Farm Tower
description: A dark room tower that spawns hostile mobs (zombies, skeletons, creepers, spiders) above the player's position. Mobs spawn in pitch-dark chambers (light level 0), then fall down a drop shaft that deals near-lethal damage. A collection chamber at the bottom lets the player finish them with one hit for full XP and drops. The tower is typically 4 floors of 9x9 dark rooms connected by hoppers to a kill chamber. Requires no spawner — relies on natural mob spawning mechanics within 24-128 blocks of the player.
